examples: The court will decide on the admissibility of the evidence.
We are waiting for the judge to rule on the admissibility of the defense evidence.
Although the defence challenged the quality of the evidence, no objection was taken to its admissibility.
Poland has misgivings, but is now keener as a way of promoting the admissibility of Ukraine.
Critics' concerns include lax rules for the admissibility of evidence and inadequate appeal procedures.
